debug_info.goal:
case swap
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
x y : α
l : List α
⊢ ∀ {idx1 : Fin (y :: x :: l).length} {idx2 : Fin (x :: y :: l).length},
    (y :: x :: l)[idx1] = (x :: y :: l)[idx2] → ((y :: x :: l).eraseIdx ↑idx1).Perm ((x :: y :: l).eraseIdx ↑idx2)

failed_attempts:
intro idx1 idx2 h
          cases idx1 <;> cases idx2 <;>
            simp_all [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
          <;> try { apply Perm.swap }

intro idx1 idx2 h
          cases idx1 <;> cases idx2 <;>
            simp_all [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ,
              List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
          <;> try { apply Perm.swap }

intro idx1 idx2 h
          cases idx1 <;> cases idx2 <;>
            simp_all [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ,
              List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
          <;> try { apply Perm.swap }

intro idx1 idx2 h
          cases idx1 <;> cases idx2 <;>
            simp_all [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ,
              List.Perm.swap]
